intended_use: NeuroQuant is intended for automatic labeling, visualization, and volumetric quantification of segmentable brain structures and lesions from a set of MR images. Volumetric measurements may be compared
intended_use_full: NeuroQuant is intended for automatic labeling, visualization, and volumetric quantification of segmentable brain structures and lesions from a set of MR images. Volumetric measurements may be compared to reference percentile data.
target_condition: Multiple sclerosis, microvascular ischemic disease, vasogenic edema, cerebral microbleeds, superficial siderosis, vascular disease, cerebral amyloid angiopathy
ground_truth: For brain segmentation: predicate device and gold standard computer-aided expert manual segmentation; for FLAIR and MCH models: manual expert annotations
other_metrics: Brain Segmentation Model: Dice Similarity Coefficient (DSC) compared to predicate device and gold standard; FLAIR Lesion Segmentation Model: mean DSC of 0.70 (SD 0.14), acceptance criteria mean DSC ≥ 0.50 (SD ≤ 0.18); MCH Detection Model: median F1 Score of 0.60, acceptance criteria ≥ 0.51
